outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Hegseth says US struck 7,000+ targets in Iran — data shows strike frequency 'ebbed and flowed'
outlets.summary: CNN analysis finds Pentagon claims about sustained strike tempo contradict their own data. Questions whether war is truly 'militarily won' as Trump claims.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Israel launches more strikes on Tehran as Iran continues attacks on Gulf oil facilities
outlets.summary: Tehran bombed on Nowruz. Iran strikes Gulf. IRGC spokesman Naeini killed after disputing Netanyahu's missile claim.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Israel Blew Open an Energy War With Iran That Trump Will Find Hard to Stop
outlets.summary: South Pars strike now straining US-Israel ties. Analysts warn of lasting energy crisis as Gulf states absorb retaliatory hits.

outlets.name: Politico
outlets.headline: Cracks emerge in GOP over Iran war cost as Trump seeks $200B
outlets.summary: Fiscal hawks in Republican Party signal resistance to $200B supplemental. Congress was not consulted on war launch.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump calls NATO 'COWARDS' as Iran targets Hormuz shipping on Nowruz
outlets.summary: Trump's Truth Social attack on NATO allies as 'COWARDS' for not helping reopen Strait of Hormuz. WaPo investigation: diverging US-Israel war objectives — US seeks disarmament, Israel pushes regime change. Day 21 Nowruz strikes continue in Tehran.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump calls NATO 'COWARDS' for refusing to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox frames Trump's NATO confrontation as justified leadership, highlighting European reluctance to contribute militarily to reopening global oil transit.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump calls NATO 'COWARDS' for refusing to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox frames Trump's NATO confrontation as justified leadership, highlighting European reluctance to contribute militarily to reopening global oil transit.

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: Iran defiant nearly 4 weeks into war, hitting oil facilities around the Gulf
outlets.summary: Iran continues regional strikes despite claimed military degradation. IRGC insists missile production ongoing.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: 'Death and Destruction From Above': Hegseth Says Biggest Strike Package Yet Will Hit Iran Today
outlets.summary: Hegseth's Pentagon briefing: 7,000+ targets struck, 90% reduction in ballistic attacks on US forces, 11 Iranian subs destroyed.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump calls NATO 'COWARDS' for refusing to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Fox frames Trump's NATO confrontation as justified leadership, highlighting European reluctance to contribute militarily to reopening global oil transit.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 21: Tehran warns of intensified strikes if energy sites targeted; Iran fires IRBMs at Diego Garcia
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera provides comprehensive coverage of Nowruz strikes and Iran's unprecedented ballistic missile attack on Diego Garcia, warning of further escalation.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Nowruz 2026: Iranians mark Persian New Year under bombs and fear
outlets.summary: Iranians describe 'very different' Nowruz with strikes audible in Tehran. No public message from Mojtaba Khamenei.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Switzerland halts weapons exports to US over Iran conflict, citing neutrality
outlets.summary: First formal invocation of Swiss neutrality law against US. Ban covers all new export licences for duration of conflict.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Trump's Pearl Harbor joke tests US-Japan alliance amid Iran tensions
outlets.summary: Trump compared Iran surprise strikes to Pearl Harbor in front of Takaichi. European allies say it underscores lack of consultation.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran's Khamenei warns of 'other fronts' in Nowruz statement — still not seen publicly
outlets.summary: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's full Nowruz written statement: names 2026 'year of resistance economy under national unity.' Claims enemy made 'gross miscalculation.' Warns 'other fronts may be activated.' Has not appeared publicly since assuming power Feb 28. EU summit calls for energy site moratorium.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran 'can no longer enrich uranium' — signals ground component needed for revolution
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers Netanyahu's first English press conference since war began, where he made sweeping claims about Iran's nuclear and missile degradation while hinting at ground operations.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: A Billion Shekels a Day: The Hidden Clock Behind Israel's War With Iran
outlets.summary: Daily cost nearing 1B shekels. Budget limits may become key factor in deciding war's end date.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu says Israel will hold off on energy strikes at Trump's request
outlets.summary: Netanyahu confirms Israel halting energy infrastructure attacks. Trump 'reacted angrily' to South Pars gas field strike.

outlets.name: i24NEWS
outlets.headline: IDF strikes Tehran on Nowruz as Iran fires on Gulf neighbors during Eid
outlets.summary: Day 21 coincides with Nowruz and Eid al-Fitr. Strikes across Tehran. Gulf wide-area missile and drone intercepts.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran fires 8th missile salvo — fragments 400m from Western Wall; Hezbollah intelligence chief killed
outlets.summary: Day 21: Iran launches 8th ballistic missile salvo since midnight on Nowruz. Intercepted missile fragments land 400m from Western Wall in Jerusalem Old City. IDF kills Hezbollah intelligence chief Hussein Makled in Beirut. New evacuation orders for southern Lebanon. Israel deploys 2,500 more Marines.

outlets.name: IRNA (Islamic Republic News Agency)
outlets.headline: Leader's Nowruz message: enemy defeated, Iran's resistance economy strengthened
outlets.summary: State media broadcasts Khamenei's written Nowruz message declaring Iran's enemy 'defeated' and calling 2026 the year of 'resistance economy under national unity.' No public appearance by leader.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran fires back: Tehran threatens 'intensified response' to Nowruz strikes on capital
outlets.summary: Iran vows escalated retaliation after Israel's Nowruz airstrikes on Tehran. Government says cultural day attacks demonstrate 'barbaric nature of the Zionist enemy.'

outlets.name: Iran International (opposition)
outlets.headline: Iran does not seek ceasefire but war must end, FM Araghchi says — as Israel kills 4th official in week
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on Araghchi's continued rejection of ceasefire talks while covering the wave of senior official killings. Mojtaba Khamenei's first public statement analyzed.

outlets.name: Tasnim News (IRGC-affiliated)
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires rockets into northern Israel — confirms operations from Lebanon continuing
outlets.summary: IRGC-linked outlet covers Hezbollah's continued operations into northern Israel as Iran renews Gulf attacks. Claims axis of resistance 'unbowed' despite leadership losses.

outlets.name: IRNA (Islamic Republic News Agency)
outlets.headline: Leader's Nowruz message: enemy defeated, Iran's resistance economy strengthened
outlets.summary: State media broadcasts Khamenei's written Nowruz message declaring Iran's enemy 'defeated' and calling 2026 the year of 'resistance economy under national unity.' No public appearance by leader.
